race.description: Dubbo Rsl Club Winter Country Classic Final Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: KELILAH (6) three weeks between runs when she ploughed through the heavy going to score a surprise win over 1300m at this track three-and-a-half weeks ago. Gets weight relief with the claim and no reason she cannot salute again. JAMACRI (8) has progressed nicely in her last couple of runs. Indicated a win was imminent two-back, then landed the prize as favourite over 1400m at Warren in easier company. Senior rider hops aboard and gets her chance in this vein of form. GREEN PINEAPPLE (7) found form at his last three runs and should get the right tempo from the low gate. Looks to have solid each-way claims. AILYAK (2) eye-catching return with the big weight and looks set for a good prep.
